vocab.example: I once had a conflict with a teammate about the plan.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi từng có xung đột với một đồng nghiệp về kế hoạch.

vocab.example: We had a disagreement about the project deadline.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi bất đồng về hạn chót của dự án.

vocab.example: I tried to understand his point of view first.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đã cố hiểu quan điểm của anh ấy trước.

vocab.example: We reached a compromise that worked for both of us.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi đạt được một thoả hiệp phù hợp cho cả hai.

vocab.example: I asked everyone to calm down before we continued.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đã yêu cầu mọi người bình tĩnh lại trước khi tiếp tục.

vocab.example: We resolved the conflict within one meeting.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi đã giải quyết xung đột chỉ trong một buổi họp.

vocab.example: Active listening helped me understand the real issue.
vocab.example_vi: Lắng nghe chủ động giúp tôi hiểu được vấn đề thực sự.

vocab.example: We solved it with mutual respect and open communication.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi giải quyết bằng sự tôn trọng lẫn nhau và giao tiếp cởi mở.

listening.title: Interview: handling conflict in a team

lines.speaker: Interviewer
lines.text: Linh, can you tell me about a time you had a conflict with a colleague?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Yes, last year I had a disagreement with a teammate about how to design a feature.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: We had different points of view on the user interface, and it caused some tension.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: I asked him to calm down, and we used active listening to understand each other.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Yes, we found a compromise that combined both of our ideas.

lines.speaker: Interviewer
lines.text: What did you learn from that experience?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: I learned that conflicts can be solved quickly with mutual respect and open communication.

questions.q: What did Linh do to resolve the conflict?
options: Used active listening and stayed calm

questions.q: What did Linh learn from the experience?
options: Conflicts can be solved with mutual respect

shadowing: I once had a disagreement with a teammate about the design.
We had different points of view on the user interface.
I asked everyone to calm down and listen carefully to each other.
We found a compromise that combined both of our ideas.
I learned that conflicts can be solved with mutual respect.
